title: Add user sign-up and authentication with Internet Identity

requirements.text: Integrate Internet Identity authentication to allow users to sign up and log in securely using passkey-based authentication

quotes: yes i will like to add a sign up feature

acceptanceCriteria: Users can click a sign-up/login button to authenticate with Internet Identity
Authentication state is persisted across browser sessions
The UI displays the user's authenticated status (logged in vs anonymous)
Users can log out from their account

requirements.text: Associate quiz responses with authenticated user principals in the backend to enable personalized result tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Quiz submission function accepts and stores the caller's Principal
Each quiz response is linked to the user who submitted it
Anonymous users can still take quizzes without authentication

requirements.text: Create a user profile or history page where authenticated users can view their past quiz results and track their mental wellness journey over time
acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated users can navigate to a profile/history page
The page displays a list of previous quiz attempts with dates and scores
Users can see their progress trends over time
The page maintains the warm, supportive design theme

requirements.text: Add backend functions to retrieve a user's quiz history based on their Principal, including timestamps and scores
acceptanceCriteria: Backend provides a query function to fetch all quiz attempts for a given Principal
Results include submission timestamps and calculated scores
Function returns an empty list for users with no history

requirements.text: Update the quiz submission flow to use the authenticated actor when users are logged in, ensuring their results are saved to their account
acceptanceCriteria: When authenticated, quiz submissions are sent through the authenticated actor
Results are stored with the user's Principal in the backend
Anonymous users continue to use localStorage for temporary results
The results page reflects whether results are saved to an account or are temporary

constraints: Use Internet Identity for authentication (already integrated via useInternetIdentity hook)
Maintain the existing warm, calming visual design theme
Allow anonymous users to continue taking quizzes without requiring sign-up
